overall.description: A static first-person view of a luxurious cyberpunk apartment bedroom from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features a large window overlooking a rainy nighttime cityscape, a messy bed in the foreground, and a holographic display cycling through various neon advertisements. The atmosphere is moody with dark tones accented by cyan and red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury cyberpunk apartment bedroom with holographic entertainment system

events.description: holographic display activates showing 'HATE' advertisement text
display transitions to show Cyberpunk 2077 logo animation
display changes to All Foods corporation advertisement with yellow background

agents.ego_description: standing still in the bedroom, observing the cycling holographic advertisements on the display

entered.detail: large bed with disheveled white and grey sheets and pillows in the foreground
open book or magazine resting on the bed sheets
floor-to-ceiling window showing rainy nighttime cityscape with distant neon lights
curved ceiling with horizontal wooden slats and recessed spot lighting
large floating holographic screen displaying various cycling advertisements
large illuminated water feature with cyan teal lighting behind the display
red neon signage visible through the water feature in the background

segments.scene_description: A static view of a high-end cyberpunk bedroom at night. The camera remains fixed showing a messy bed with an open book in the foreground and a large window revealing a rainy cityscape. To the right, a holographic display cycles through various corporate advertisements including 'HATE', 'BIG' energy drink, and 'All Foods', while cyan neon lighting illuminates an aquarium feature behind it. No characters are present and the environment is completely still except for the changing digital content on the screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective of a high-end cyberpunk bedroom that remains frozen in a moody, nocturnal atmosphere. It begins with a focus on a messy bed and an open book in the foreground, set against the backdrop of a large window overlooking a rainy cityscape. As the gaze lingers, the attention shifts toward a holographic display on the right that cycles through corporate advertisements for 'HATE', 'BIG' energy drink, and 'All Foods'. The scene then settles into the interplay of light, where cyan neon illumination glows from an aquarium feature behind the shifting digital screens. Finally, the environment remains completely still, with only the flickering neon and changing advertisements providing movement within the dark, luxurious space.
